summary: Validated emergency/SOS feature end-to-end on public URL. Backend /api/analyze-symptoms returns emergency=true for High severity, dashboard chat renders red emergency UI for High responses, SOS click shows alert and logs 'Emergency triggered', and recent history cards display emergency banner + SOS for High items.
action_items: No blocking defects found for requested emergency/SOS scope.
Keep /api/clinics as MOCKED in this environment (out of scope for this feature).
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard emergency UI is consistently implemented in both chat responses and recent history cards for High severity items.
triggerEmergency correctly executes both required actions: alert display and console logging.
Emergency field propagation from backend analyze response to frontend message state is correctly wired via response.data.emergency.
seed_data_creation: No dedicated seed data created; runtime high/low messages submitted during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression for emergency flag added in /app/backend/tests/test_emergency_sos_flow.py. UI automation confirmed chat + history emergency banner/SOS behavior and SOS alert+console log on public URL.
rca of the issue: No issue reproduced for requested emergency/SOS features in this run.
